case_title: PERSOLVE, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. SHAWNA A. SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE COMPLAINT FOR MONEY AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2007, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE OF JUDGEMENT DEBTORS' EXAMINATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERSOLVE, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
ORDER OF EXAMINATION JUL-17-2008 DISCHARGED AS TO SHAWNA A. SMITH. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-02-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED IN PART, GRANTED IN PART. THE LEVYING OFFICER SHALL WITHDRAWN $200.00 PER PAY PERIOD FOR THE BENEFIT OF THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Edith Alexandryan, Esq., appearing by telephone, for Plaintiff and moving party: Persolve, LLC
Shawna A. Smith, judgment debtor in Propria Persona

After hearing, The judgment debtor's Claim of exemption is denied in part, Granted in part.
The levying officer shall withdrawn $200.00 per pay period for the benefit of the judgment Creditor. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
